title: Hayntida Dakhliga
ask_prompt: Cabbirradayda hayntida dakhliga: Celceliska haynta guud {retention}%, celceliska tegitaanka {churn}%, hayntida dakhliga saafiga ah {nrr}%. Dakhliga bishii ee halista ugu jira tegitaanka: {atRisk}. Isbeddelka tegitaanka: {trend}. Istaraatiijiyadee ayaa yaraynaya tegitaanka dakhligayga?
revenue_at_risk_desc: Qiyaasta dakhliga bishii ee lagu waayay tegitaan
net_shrinking_value: Dakhliga balaadhinta ma daboolo tegitaanka — diirad saar iibinta dheeraadka ah macaamiisha hadda jira
strong_expansion_value: {nrr}% NRR — macaamiisha hadda jira ayaa kordhinaya kharashkooda
concentration_risk: Halis isu-uruurin: {n}% dakhliga wuxuu ka yimaadaa hal kanaal
